sourceTitle: Frequently asked questions about generative AI at Sydney
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Clause 4(9)(2)(j)(i) states that it is an academic integrity breach to inappropriately generate content using artificial intelligence to complete an assessment task. Clause 4(13)(1)(i) states that submitting an assessment generated by AI may be considered contract cheating.
evidenceLocator: The policy and assessment frameworks section, “What is in the policy about generative AI use by students?”
